realm.name: employee
realm.description: Staff - can manage bookings and update vehicle status

realm.name: customer
realm.description: Standard customer - can search, book, pay and leave ratings

realm.name: admin
realm.description: Full access - fleet management, users, reports

clients.name: Car Rental Admin (service account)
clients.description: Confidential client used by the backend to manage users (e.g. clear bookingConfirmationCode after linking). Secret is a dev-only placeholder — rotate for production and set Keycloak:AdminClientSecret to match.

clientScopes.name: web-origins
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add allowed web origins to the access token

clientScopes.name: service_account
clientScopes.description: Specific scope for a client enabled for service accounts

clientScopes.name: organization
clientScopes.description: Additional claims about the organization a subject belongs to

clientScopes.name: acr
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add acr (authentication context class reference) to the token

clientScopes.name: roles
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add user roles to the access token

clientScopes.name: basic
clientScopes.description: OpenID Connect scope for add all basic claims to the token

kc.user.profile.config: {"attributes":[{"name":"username","displayName":"${username}","validations":{"length":{"min":3,"max":255},"username-prohibited-characters":{}},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]},"multivalued":false},{"name":"email","displayName":"${email}","validations":{"email":{},"length":{"max":255}},"required":{"roles":["user"]},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]},"multivalued":false},{"name":"firstName","displayName":"${firstName}","validations":{"length":{"max":255},"person-name-prohibited-characters":{}},"required":{"roles":["user"]},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]},"multivalued":false},{"name":"lastName","displayName":"${lastName}","validations":{"length":{"max":255},"person-name-prohibited-characters":{}},"required":{"roles":["user"]},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]},"multivalued":false},{"name":"bookingConfirmationCode","displayName":"Booking Confirmation Code","group":"booking","validations":{"length":{"min":0,"max":20},"pattern":{"pattern":"^$|^CRS-[A-HJ-NP-Z2-9]{6}$","error-message":"Expected format: CRS-XXXXXX"}},"annotations":{"inputHelperTextBefore":"Paste the code from your guest booking to link it to this account (optional)."},"permissions":{"view":["admin","user"],"edit":["admin","user"]},"multivalued":false}],"groups":[{"name":"booking","displayHeader":"Link An Existing Booking","displayDescription":"Optional — attach a guest booking to this new account."}]}

Flow to determine if the OTP is required for the authentication
Flow to determine if the authenticator that adds organization members is to be used
Flow to determine if any 2FA is required for the authentication
Handle what to do if there is existing account with same email/username like authenticated identity provider

Used by Docker clients to authenticate against the IDP
